  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,

      "text": "tas Kehninsch Akas no Damas-
kus pahrgahje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu tas Kehninsch A-
kas no Damaskus pahrgahje /
tad redseja tas Kehninsch to Al-
tari/ un tas Kehninsch gahje pee
ta Altara/ un uppureja us to/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eededsinaja fawn De-
Dsamo-Uppuri/un tawuEhdamo-
Uppuri/ un iſtehje fawn Dserra-
mo-Uppuri/ un flazzija tawas
Pateiffchanas-Uppura Affini us
to Altari.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to warra Altari/kas
ta KUNGA Preekychâ bija / to
nozehle wiꞥſch no ta Namma
preekſch Galla / starp (fawu)
Altari/ un starp ta KUNGA
Dianmu/ un zehle to fahnis (fa-
wu) Altari/prett Seemeta puffi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Akas
patwehleja tam Preestexam Uri-
jafam / fazzidams: Us to leeln
Altari buhs tew eededsinacht to
Dedsamo-Uppuri Rihtâ / un to
Ehdamo-Uppuri Wakkarâ / ir ta
Kehnixa Dedsamo-Uppuri / un
wiꞥſch Ehdamo-Uppuri/ ir wiſſu
Semmes Lanschu Dedsamo-Up-
puri/ un wiꞥſch Oserramo-Up-
puri / un tew buhs us to wiſſu
Affini flazzinaht no teem De-
dsamo-Uppureem/ un no teem zit-
teem Uppureem/ bet par to war-
ra Altari es dohmaschu / ko es
darrischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Preesteris Urijas
darrja pehz wiſſu / ko tas keh-
ninsch Akas bij pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Akas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "nolaufsja tohs Sahnii Galdi
no teem Skrahgeem/ un none
me no winno Wirſus tohs Ka-
lus/ un nozehle to Juhru no tee
Warra Wehrscheen / kas a
pakſch tahs bija/ un zehle to u
weenu Aknixo Grihdi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir to Swehdeenas De-
ki/ ko tee Namimâ bij darriſch
un ta Kehnixa Eegahjumu no a
renes atkehnne wiſch no 1
KUNGA Mamma/ ta Kehni
no Affrijas labbad.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Aka
Leetahmatleek/ ko wiſsch irr da-
rijs/ tas irr rakstihts to Kehn
nu no Juhda Laiku-Grabmatâ
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Akas aismitge ar �
weem Tehweem/ un tappe p
faweem Tehweem aprakts Da
wida Pilli/ un Iſtijus wiſſu
Dehls tappe par Kehnizu wi-
na Weetâ.
"
    }
